emailTemplates.subject: Re: Your Inquiry - AI Marketing Automation Solution
emailTemplates.body:
Hi Rachel,

I hope this email finds you well. I'm reaching out regarding AI-powered business automation for Green.

Thank you for your inquiry about our AI marketing automation platform. I'd love to show you how we can streamline your content creation and social media management.

Our platform has helped businesses like Tax4Us achieve:
• 50% reduction in manual tasks
• 3x faster content creation
• Automated customer communication
• Real-time analytics and reporting

Would you be interested in a 15-minute demo to see how we can automate your follow up on website inquiry for marketing automation?

Best regards,
Shai Friedman
Rensto - AI Business Automation
emailTemplates.followUp:
Hi Rachel,

I wanted to follow up on my previous email about AI automation for Green.

If you haven't had a chance to review our proposal yet, I'd be happy to:
• Schedule a personalized demo
• Provide case studies from similar businesses
• Discuss your specific automation needs

What would work best for you?

Best regards,
Shai Friedman
Rensto - AI Business Automation
